mapper.select: select ID as id, GROUP_ID as groupId, RECNO as recno, FIELD_ID as fieldId, FIELD_NAME as fieldName, DETERMINER_ID as determinerId, DETERMINER_NAME as determinerName, IS_QUERY as isQuery, IS_CONTORL as isContorl, NEED_VALUE as needValue, MEMO as memo, HEAD_MEMO as headMemo, ISMD5 as isMd5, s.COLUMNNAME as columnName, s.FIELDCHINESENAME as fieldChineseName, s.FIELDTYPE as fieldType, s.FIELDLEN as fieldLen, s.GADSJ_FIELDID as gadsjFieldId from (select * from SYNLTE.STANDARDIZE_PUBLIC_DATAFIELD where group_id = #{groupId}) spd left join (select COLUMNNAME, FIELDCHINESENAME, FIELDTYPE, FIELDLEN, GADSJ_FIELDID, FIELDID from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD) s on s.FIELDID = spd.field_id order by recno
